targets.rawSql: SELECT o.strategy_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f_settle.order_id IS NOT NULL) AS n_trades, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE((f_settle.metadata::jsonb->>'pnl')::numeric, 0))::numeric, 2) AS pnl_usd, ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN (f_settle.metadata::jsonb->>'resolution') = 'win' THEN 1.0 WHEN (f_settle.metadata::jsonb->>'resolution') = 'loss' THEN 0.0 END)::numeric, 1) AS win_rate_pct, ROUND(AVG((f_settle.metadata::jsonb->>'pnl')::numeric)::numeric, 3) AS avg_pnl FROM trading.orders o LEFT JOIN trading.fills f_settle ON f_settle.order_id=o.order_id AND f_settle.metadata::jsonb->>'kind'='settle' WHERE o.mode='paper' AND o.ts_submit > now() - interval '7 days' GROUP BY o.strategy_id ORDER BY pnl_usd DESC NULLS LAST;

SELECT f.ts AS time, o.strategy_id AS metric, SUM((f.metadata::jsonb->>'pnl')::numeric) OVER (PARTITION BY o.strategy_id ORDER BY f.ts) AS equity FROM trading.fills f JOIN trading.orders o ON o.order_id = f.order_id WHERE f.mode='paper' AND f.metadata::jsonb->>'kind'='settle' AND f.ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY f.ts;

SELECT f.ts AS time, SUM((f.metadata::jsonb->>'pnl')::numeric) OVER (ORDER BY f.ts) AS equity_total FROM trading.fills f WHERE f.mode='paper' AND f.metadata::jsonb->>'kind'='settle' AND f.ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY f.ts;

SELECT date_trunc('day', o.ts_submit) AS day, o.strategy_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f_settle.order_id IS NOT NULL) AS settled, COUNT(*) AS entered FROM trading.orders o LEFT JOIN trading.fills f_settle ON f_settle.order_id=o.order_id AND f_settle.metadata::jsonb->>'kind'='settle' WHERE o.mode='paper' AND o.ts_submit > now() - interval '7 days' GROUP BY day, o.strategy_id ORDER BY day DESC, o.strategy_id;

SELECT name, version, trained_at, metrics->'test_auc' AS test_auc, metrics->'test_brier' AS test_brier, metrics->'ece_val' AS ece_val FROM research.models WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY trained_at DESC;

panels.title: Strategy health — rolling Sharpe per trade

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, strategy_id AS metric, sharpe_per_trade AS value FROM research.strategy_health WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY ts;
